full_description: Place {A} into {B}; two blocks start upper and one starts lower.
schema: {a} denotes the arm that moves a block
preference: num of words should not exceed 18. Emphasize there are three blocks and the target plate is on the lower layer.
seen: Place {A} into {B}; two start upper and one starts lower.
Put {A} into {B} after collecting them from above and below.
Carry {A} into {B}, with two from above and one from below.
Transfer {A} into {B} from mixed upper and lower layers.
Pick every block and place {A} into {B}.
unseen: Place the full set of {A} into {B}.

seen: find one remaining block and grasp it
find the lower plate and place the block into it
unseen: place the block into the lower plate
